By visiting the Jaguar Centre, your donation will go directly to caring for rainforest animals. Guided 1.5 hr visits are daily at 09.30 am and 11.30 am. Entrance fee: US$27. Private tours are also available. These combo tours include a visit to the Jaguar Rescue Center:Combo tour with the Jaguar Rescue Centre, Chocolate making and a guided hike to a waterfall
Combo tour to the rescue centre and a guided hike at Punta Uva.

description_full: Horseback riding tours which give you the chance to ride horses on the beach. Whatever your age, background or level of experience, everybody is welcome. They have more than 30 years of experience and worked in different countries. Tours can be booked in English, Spanish, German and Swedish. Previously named The Prancing Pony.

business_name: Talamanca Chocolate - Playa Negra, Puerto Viejo, Limón, Costa Rica
description_full: Learn the entire process from tree to bar, making chocolate from scratch: roasting, grinding, tempering then molding. With tasting all along the way. There will be lots to learn and taste, from flavour development to label design, this is a full experience.

business_name: Adobe EasyCar Rent a Car
description_full: Car rentals from the Adobe and EasyCar brands. One way rentals available from locations throughout Costa Rica with pickup or return in Puerto Viejo. Check car rental rates in Puerto Viejo here

business_name: Alamo Enterprise Car Rental
description_full: Car rentals. One way rentals available from locations throughout Costa Rica with pickup or return in Puerto Viejo. Check car rental rates in Puerto Viejo here

business_name: Caribe Shuttle
description_full: Semi-private shuttle service to many destinations in Costa Rica.  Services to/from Puerto Viejo include Bocas del Toro, San Jose, Limón Airport, Arenal, Tortuguero and San Juan del Sur. Packages for Bocas and Puerto Viejo are also available. Wifi is available on most shuttles. Book now on the full national network of Caribe Shuttle:

business_name: Interbus office
description_full: Puerto Viejo office for Interbus, who operate shuttles throughout Costa Rica. Check the Shuttle page for schedules, information and online booking. Book the full nationwide network of Interbus shuttles here

business_name: Puerto Viejo Golf Carts
description_full: Golf cart sales and rentals with daily and weekly rates, 2 and 4 person, gas and electric options. Also tuktuk dispatch. The golf carts are generally on display outside Cafe Viejo or Restaurante Bar Tamara but you will need to contact them via Whatsapp or phone to arrange rentals.

business_name: ATEC
description_full: Asociación Talamanqueña Ecoturismo Conservación is Puerto Viejo’s original eco-tourism provider. They work to help visitors find fun ecologically and socially responsible activities to entertain themselves while in Talamanca. Also has cards, books, souvenirs and a couple of internet terminals.

business_name: Best Travel Puerto Viejo
description_full: Travel agency offering tour, transport and hotel bookings. They also operate their own transports to Bocas del Toro and other locations. You can book transportation between Puerto Viejo and Bocas del Toro here.

business_name: Caribe Fun Tours - Playa Negra, Puerto Viejo, Limón, Costa Rica
description_full: Tour company operating out of Hotel Banana Azul that offers local tours plus transportation options to and from Puerto Viejo.

business_name: Gecko Trail Costa Rica
description_full: Travel agency offering a full selection of local tours such as rafting, canopy, snorkeling, wildlife watching and many more activities. To get around Costa Rica, they can also arrange a private van or shared shuttle for you. And can reserve hotels and vacation rentals. They work Costa Rica wide and in Panama and Nicaragua and can arrange your entire trip to any of these countries. All their packages can be tailored just for you.

business_name: Caribe Sur Real Estate
description_full: Representing properties for sale throughout the South Caribbean of Costa Rica. Staff speaks English, Spanish, French, Dutch and Portuguese.

business_name: Century 21 Caribe - Playa Chiquita, Puerto Viejo, Limón, Costa Rica
description_full: Real estate office. Also offering construction, environmental consulting, architecture, insurance and legal services.

business_name: Coldwell Banker Caribe
description_full: Real estate agency offering buying, selling and long-term leasing services.

business_name: RISE Puerto Viejo
description_full: Real estate and property management serving Puerto Viejo & the Caribbean coast. Also the Rise Foundation supporting the community.

business_name: Green Property Management - Playa Chiquita, Puerto Viejo, Limón, Costa Rica
description_full: Full service Property Management company dedicated to maintaining exceptional care of properties while simultaneously maximizing rental revenue. They work in a sustainable fashion in order to ensure the property is well maintained and cared for on a regular basis while at the same time making a positive impact on our environment and local communities.

description_full: Local store for the area.  Serves locals and tourists. Groceries, beer, wine, fruits and veggies, meat, souvenirs.

business_name: Servicentro Hone Creek - Hone Creek, Limón, Costa Rica
description_full: Only full gas station for miles. The next nearest are on the way to Limón or on the way to Sixaola.

business_name: Alcoholics Anonymous
description_full: Meetings at Puerto Viejo Multicentro Monday, Wednesday & Friday at 1 pm.

business_name: Catholic Church
description_full: Small catholic church

business_name: Puerto Viejo Police Station - Playa Negra, Puerto Viejo, Limón, Costa Rica
description_full: The police in Costa Rica are responsible for enforcing the peace and responding to active crimes. The OIJ with taking crime reports and investigating. See the  safety page for more information.  Call 911 in an emergency. This is the location of the main police station, there is also a satellite office in the center of town and an office of the Tourist Police in Cahuita.

business_name: Puerto Viejo Police Town Station
description_full: This is the in-town outpost of the local police. The main Puerto Viejo Police Station is located in Playa Negra. See the  safety page for more information.  Call 911 in an emergency.

business_name: Banco de Costa Rica Puerto Viejo
description_full: ATM accepts cards with Visa symbol, cashes travellers checks, does foreign exchange and full bank services.

business_name: Banco Nacional
description_full: Open Mon - Fri till 4pm.  ATM open 6 am - 10 pm (closed at night for security reasons)

business_name: Main Bus Stop
description_full: San José and local buses stop here. The bus ticket office for Autotransportes MEPE is also located directly opposite, the hours indicated here are the hours the ticket office is open. Check the  Bus Transport page for schedules. Please keep a close watch on your bags while you're here.
